title: Harden APRS-IS session authorization
description: Review during project-LICHEN-2auf.46 found AprsIsClient::send permits pre-login and Unverified receive-only sessions to transmit, and required-line timeouts are surfaced as UnexpectedEof. Define explicit session-phase/authorization checks, preserve timeout-vs-EOF semantics, and add deterministic login/send/write-failure tests. This is separate from lost bounded-line recovery.
